antipattern.symptom: Every leaf is <2h verb-led; tree is really a task list.
antipattern.root-cause: Author confuses WBS with schedule activities.
antipattern.fix: Enforce noun-led names + 8-80h leaves; refactor verbs into schedule-development.

antipattern.symptom: Single leaf 'Build platform' estimated at 600h; EVM impossible.
antipattern.fix: Force >80h leaves to decompose further before sign-off.

antipattern.symptom: Tree contains 'Mobile companion app' but scope baseline excludes mobile.
antipattern.fix: Cross-check every node against signed baseline; reject orphans.

antipattern.symptom: Outline complete; dictionary empty; acceptance ambiguous at hand-off.
